Package com.mentor.chs.api.workbook.data

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXCellData
    This class represents a table cell to be used to generate workbooks
    IXFileImageData
    This data will be used with a print service instance to generate the workbook.
    IXImageListData
    Holds a list of images which will be printed as a flow layout
    IXImageTableList
    A list of image and table pairs which are assumed to be printed as a flow layout
    IXImageTablePair
    A pair of image and table, used by workbook data types such as IXImageTableList
    IXProviderDataFactory
    This factory is used to make the types of data that can be returned from an IXProvider.
    IXTableData
    Data object used to present a table in Capital Workbooks.
    IXTextData
    This data will be used with a print service instance to generate the workbook.
    IXWorkbookData
    A data type that will represent information outputted from a provider This data will be used with a print service instance to generate the workbook
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    ImageType
    Specifies the type of a corresponding image data.
